title: ReplicationConfiguration
description: Replication configuration for a source server

associateDefaultSecurityGroup.description: Whether to associate default security group

replicationServersSecurityGroupsIDs.description: Security group IDs for replication servers

replicationServerInstanceType.description: EC2 instance type for replication servers

useLowBandwidthForReplication.description: Whether to use low bandwidth for replication

createPublicIP.description: Whether to create public IP for replication servers

bandwidthThrottling.description: Bandwidth throttling in Mbps (0 for unlimited)

defaultLargeStagingDiskType.description: Default EBS volume type for large staging disks

ebsEncryptionKeyArn.description: KMS key ARN for EBS encryption
